text:
Once upon a time in the sleepy town of Sleepy Hollow, there lived a timid squirrel named Charlie. Charlie loved acorns, but he was too scared to visit the acorn groves. One day, while browsing the old oak tree near his home, he found a peculiar seed. fascination. It glowed like the moon and had a voice that sang songs of adventure.

The seed told Charlie stories of a secret grove where the lost Acworth treasures awaited. Eager to uncover them, Charlie hoarded nuts all summer. When autumn came, he sprouted wings, became a graceful owl, and darted into the grove under the cloak of darkness.

As he fluttered among the leaves, Charlie heard the music cease—it was a melody like no other. Trees bowed, moonbeams danced, and stars twinkled. Then, from the heart of the grove, a mysterious figure emerged. She was adorned in garments woven from moonlight and stars.

She introduced herself as Luna
